name: @straiforos/traiforce-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Traiforce Protocol ATproto lexicons

scripts.gen: lex gen-api --yes src/types/ lexicons/net/traiforce/actor/profile.json lexicons/net/traiforce/actor/grant.json lexicons/net/traiforce/feed/item.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run gen && npm run build

author: straiforos
